theorem procedural_Associated_neg_right_iff_8450aeea1f6d : ((∀ {M : Type _} [Monoid M] [HasDistribNeg M] {a b : M}, Associated a (-b) ↔ Associated a b) ∧
    (∀ {α : Type _} {s : Finset α} {p q : α → Prop} [DecidablePred p] [DecidablePred q],
      Disjoint (Finset.filter p s) (Finset.filter q s) ↔ ∀ x ∈ s, p x → ¬q x)) ∧
  (∀ {ι : Type _} {R : ι → Type _} {S : ι → Type _} [(i : ι) → NonUnitalNonAssocSemiring (R i)]
    [(i : ι) → NonUnitalNonAssocSemiring (S i)] (e : (i : ι) → R i ≃+* S i),
    (RingEquiv.piCongrRight e).symm = RingEquiv.piCongrRight fun i => (e i).symm) := by
  sorry

((∀ {M : Type _} [Monoid M] [HasDistribNeg M] {a b : M}, Associated a (-b) ↔ Associated a b) ∧

      Disjoint (Finset.filter p s) (Finset.filter q s) ↔ ∀ x ∈ s, p x → ¬q x)) ∧
  (∀ {ι : Type _} {R : ι → Type _} {S : ι → Type _} [(i : ι) → NonUnitalNonAssocSemiring (R i)]
    [(i : ι) → NonUnitalNonAssocSemiring (S i)] (e : (i : ι) → R i ≃+* S i),
    (RingEquiv.piCongrRight e).symm = RingEquiv.piCongrRight fun i => (e i).symm)

theorem procedural_associator_cocycle_de2025b9ebab : ((∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalNonAssocRing R] (a b c d : R),
      a * associator b c d - associator (a * b) c d + associator a (b * c) d - associator a b (c * d) +
          associator a b c * d =
        0) ∨
    False) ∨
  False := by
  sorry

theorem procedural_isCancelMulZero_iff_isDomain_or_subsingleton_805168ec67be : (∀ {R : Type _} [AddCommMonoid R] [Mul R] {ι : Type _} {I : Finset ι} {s : ι → R} (hs : ∀ i ∈ I, IsSumSq (s i)),
    IsSumSq (∑ i ∈ I, s i)) →
  ((∀ (α : Type _) [Semiring α], IsCancelMulZero α ↔ IsDomain α ∨ Subsingleton α) ∧
    (∀ {ι : Type _} {R : ι → Type _} {S : ι → Type _} [(i : ι) → NonUnitalNonAssocSemiring (R i)]
      [(i : ι) → NonUnitalNonAssocSemiring (S i)] (e : (i : ι) → R i ≃+* S i),
      (RingEquiv.piCongrRight e).symm = RingEquiv.piCongrRight fun i => (e i).symm)) := by
  sorry

  ((∀ (α : Type _) [Semiring α], IsCancelMulZero α ↔ IsDomain α ∨ Subsingleton α) ∧

theorem procedural_AddMonoidHom_map_mul_iff_9e8283e76bac : True →
  ((∀ {R : Type _} {S : Type _} [NonUnitalNonAssocSemiring R] [NonUnitalNonAssocSemiring S] (f : R →+ S),
      (∀ (x y : R), f (x * y) = f x * f y) ↔ AddMonoidHom.mul.compr₂ f = (AddMonoidHom.mul.comp f).compl₂ f) ∨
    False) := by
  sorry

      (∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalRing R] [IsAddTorsionFree R] {p q : R} (hp : IsIdempotentElem p)
        (hq : IsIdempotentElem q), IsIdempotentElem (q - p) ↔ p * q = p ∧ q * p = p)) ∨
  False := by
  sorry
